examples: Similar results were achieved in Finland and on the New Jersey Turnpike.
She reached a turnpike-gate which stood upon the highway to the village.
At a Pennsylvania Turnpike rest stop, we tossed a football in the parking lot.
Rich shook my hand and gave me excellent directions back to the New Jersey Turnpike.
Tidal surge piled 24 rail cars on top of the New Jersey Turnpike near exit 12.
